## LibraryData.Converters.collectionJsonConverter() function

Creates a converter for JSON collection source files. Parses JSON string content and validates as a collection source file.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function collectionJsonConverter<T>(itemConverter: Converter<T> | Validator<T>): Converter<ICollectionSourceFile<T>>;
```
